---
title: Fanny et Alexandre
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557598/fannyetalexandre_20210627_ecnp8f.png
description: Fanny et Alexandre
categories: [fanart]
date: 2021-06-27
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557598/fannyetalexandre_20210627_ecnp8f.png)

::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
